title: Ubiquiti airFiber Dish 23dBi, 5GHz, Slant 45
description: The compact form factor allows the airFiber X Antennas to be used in various applications , from carrier backhauls between towers to PtP bridging between buildings. Housed in a compact form factor (378-mm diameter size), the AF-5G23-S45 offers 23dBi of gain and features the following advantages: Low sidelobes reduce interference from other transmitters in the area. High isolation enhances performance for co-location in tower-mounted installations.
